description_long: This is a modern, boxy lounge sofa with a deep blue exterior and a minimalist, geometric design. The lounge features two large seat cushions and two backrest cushions, all of which are rectangular and appear firmly attached to the frame. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend the full depth of the sofa, providing a sense of enclosure and comfort. The legs are short, blocky, and set at the corners, giving the sofa a sturdy, grounded appearance. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or tufting, contributing to a sleek, contemporary look. The overall construction suggests a wooden or metal internal frame with foam padding and fabric or faux leather covering.
description: A modern, boxy blue lounge sofa with broad armrests, rectangular cushions, and a smooth, solid upholstery. The design is minimalist and sturdy, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two backrest cushions, and broad armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the armrest and the blocky leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the solid back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible armrest and leg structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two backrest cushions, all rectangular and firmly attached, spanning the full width; no loose or corner cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, rectangular backrest at medium height, split into two segments, no tufting or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; broad, straight, and at full seat height, matching the sofa's boxy style.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky legs at each corner, likely wood or metal, with a simple, sturdy appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color with a smooth, matte finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
